titles.title: I Love Living in Love with Jesus

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a love song rising up inside of me, These feelings in my heart must be released, I feel so alive, I just can't help but sing, About the One who makes my heart beat.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I love living in love with Jesus, I love knowing that He loves me, He makes the sun shine in my heart, When the way is dim, Oh! How I love living in love with Him.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His presence is a treasure this world can't afford, Each day with Him is sweeter than before, He satisfied me yet He makes me long for more, Even in the sunshine and the storm.
